Project.title: Project History
Project.description: Stores user specification prompts, code outputs, active file path formats, and metrics.

id.description: Document ID matching standard alphanumeric keys.

specification.description: Raw requirements prompt processed by AutoForge.

language.description: Language choice selector e.g. typescript, python, rust, go.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp or Firebase server time when project was created.

files.description: List of files produced during code-generation runs.

architecture.description: Solutions modules and telemetry data routes.

testReport.description: Assertions metrics reporting coverage, pass rate, duration.

AuditLog.title: Continuous Audit Logs
AuditLog.description: Stores security alerts, performance issues, style checks, and iterative self-repair attempts.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp for this checklist audit event.

securityAlerts.description: List of warnings and critical vulnerabilities flagged by security reviewer.

performanceOptimizations.description: List of algorithmic cleanups and code modifications proposed by optimizer.

repairHistory.description: Sequence of self-repair feedback runs executed during test verification.

/projects/{projectId}.description: The collections for all AutoForge playground runs.

/projects/{projectId}/audit_logs/{logId}.description: Audit trails and repair sequences corresponding to a code generation run.
